description:
The table presents a hierarchical classification system for Land Cover / Land Use (LULC) categories, detailing levels 1, 2, and 3, with an empty column for Level 4, and corresponding Mapping and Assessment of Ecosystems and their Services (MAES) Level 2 classifications. The table is partially visible, showing categories for "Urban", "Cropland", and "Woodland and forest".

| Level 1                  | Level 2                                                           | Level 3                                                                    | Level 4 | MAES Level 2            |
|--------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------|---------|-------------------------|
| 1. Urban                 | 1.1 Urban fabric, industrial, commercial, public, military and private units |
